title: Homura More Food Enchantment
description: Minecraft mod, featuring more golden foods and enchanted golden foods.
body:
Currently added more golden foods and enchanted golden foods to Minecraft

The current foods are:
Golden Steak: Restores a large amount of saturation and grants Strength II for 3 minutes.
Golden Porkchop: Restores a large amount of hunger and grants Speed II for 3 minutes
Golden Salmon: Same stats as Golden Carrot, but grants Water Breathing for 3 minutes

Enchanted Golden Steak: Restores the same amount of saturation as a Golden Steak and grants Strength II and Haste I for 6 minutes.
Enchanted Golden Porkchop: Restores the same amount of hunger and saturation as a Golden Porkchop, and grants Speed II, Jump Boost II, and Saturation I for 6 minutes.
Enchanted Golden Salmon: Same stats as Golden Carrot, grants Water Breathing, Night Vision, and Dolphin's Grace for six minutes
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8fb65cca034c07f9a72bfd3b658049a8d621033.png) ![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27199053488c4434780393fef54e35c536387819_0.webp)
**Note: These foods can only be obtained through crafting!**
